name: Strawberry Baby
role: Strawberry Baby is the heart of the group.
fruitType: comforting friends including everyone noticing feelings helping friends
shortDescription:
Strawberry Baby is the sweet, heart-forward friend in the Fruit Baby world. They bring warmth, kindness, and emotional comfort to the group. Strawberry Baby notices when friends feel left out, nervous, sad, or unsure, and they are often the first to offer a hug, a helping hand, or a cheerful idea.

Strawberry Baby is not boring or overly shy. They are bright, playful, and full of gentle joy. Their strength is making others feel loved, included, and safe.
personality: Kind Always wants friends to feel cared
happy energy to the group Helpful	Loves
